title: One-Click Parasite Transformation
description: In higher versions, some functions of the Scape and Run: Parasites mod have been restored.
body:
Have you grown tired of...

After experiencing the allure of **Scape and Run: Parasites** Mod, did you struggle to find a comparable mod in higher versions that delivers the same intensity?

Then try the “**One-Click Parasite Transformation**” mod!

This mod recreates key mechanics from Escape: Parasite Module, allowing you to freely inject similar features into your favorite infection-themed mods. All parameters are fully customizable!

- This mod currently implements:

1. Minimum Damage

1. Instant Kill

1. Damage Cap

1. Nodes (requires setting a host)

1. Degeneration Mechanism

1. Forced Infection Conversion

_(This mod is already compatible with Fungal Infection: Spore mod. To inject into other mods, please modify the configuration file yourself.)_
